title: Student Welfare: Freedom from Discrimination, Harassment, and Retaliation
description: Conroe ISD is committed to providing a safe and respectful environment where every student is free from discrimination, harassment, and retaliation. The policy outlines how the district identifies, responds to, and addresses complaints involving mistreatment based on characteristics such as race, sex, disability, or religion. Parents, students, and staff can use this policy to understand their rights and learn how to report concerns if a student is being treated unfairly or harmfully at school.
